creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

There was a premature commit to print/hs-hscolour which updated it from 
1.13 to 1.15, but without touching the Haskell ports. [1]  Later, it has 
been backed out [2], so please, update your ports tree, reinstall 
hscolour (version 1.13) and then install the port in question. 

Thank you! 

[1] http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-ports/2009-September/180423.html 
[2] http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-ports/2009-September/180511.html
